name: migration: migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh moves rubric/RUBRIC.yaml to RUBRIC.legacy.yaml.archived
command: mkdir -p rubric && echo "rules: []" > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/scripts/migrate-rubric-to-source-folders.sh" --root "$PWD" --emit-tree "$PWD/tree" && [ -f rubric/RUBRIC.legacy.yaml.archived ] && [ ! -f rubric/RUBRIC.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
